page: Amazon Web Services m8id.8xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine powered by the AWS Nitro hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 6975P-C processor with 32 vCPUs (16 physical cores with hyper-threading) running at 3.9 GHz. The CPU architecture is x86_64, supported by a large 480 MB L3 cache. Memory configuration includes 128.0 GB of high-speed 7 GHz DDR5 RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core.

This instance includes 1900 GB of local NVMe SSD instance store volumes, offering high-speed local storage directly attached to the hypervisor. Network connectivity is rated at a baseline of 15 Gbps. The Intel Xeon processor supports advanced instruction sets, including Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX-512), Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX_TILE and AMX_INT8) for accelerated matrix operations, and hardware-based cryptography (AES, VAES, SHA_NI).

In benchmark testing, the m8id.8xlarge demonstrates top-tier performance in Geekbench single-core execution, image processing, and text processing, placing in the top 10% of tested servers. It also shows strong performance in multi-core Geekbench, Passmark CPU and memory tests, and large-block memory bandwidth reads. Given these characteristics, the instance is well-suited for general-purpose workloads, database hosting, local storage-heavy applications, and text or image processing tasks.
description: Amazon Web Services m8id.8xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose instance powered by an Intel Xeon 6975P-C processor with 32 dedicated vCPUs (16 physical cores) operating at 3.9 GHz. It features 128.0 GB of DDR5 RAM running at 7 GHz and includes 1900 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. Operating on the Nitro hypervisor, the instance delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 15 Gbps. Benchmark results indicate top-tier single-core performance, image processing, and text processing, alongside strong multi-core and memory bandwidth capabilities. The processor supports advanced instructions like AVX-512 and AMX for matrix operations. This hardware profile makes the m8id.8xlarge highly effective for database hosting, data processing, and general-purpose enterprise workloads requiring high-speed local storage.

tagline: A balanced x86_64 general-purpose instance featuring high-speed DDR5 memory, advanced matrix extensions, and fast local NVMe SSD storage.

128.0 GB of high-speed 7 GHz DDR5 memory
